datasheet.text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies and determined who has the first turn, you can select one RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army and redeploy that unit. When doing so, that unit can be placed into Strategic Reserves , regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
datasheet.name: The Path Least Travelled

datasheet.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".
datasheet.name: Path of the Outcast
